block_00: Weekly trading updates from IQ Option
block_01: Meta has officially launched its alternative to Twitter. Threads, the newly unveiled "text-based conversation app" is making waves under Meta's Instagram brand. While falling under the Instagram umbrella, Threads requires a separate download. According to CEO Mark Zuckerberg, Threads has amassed 5 million signups within its first four hours alone.
block_02: In other news: JetBlue has made the decision to sever ties with American Airlines, marking the end of their northeastern U.S. partnership. This move comes after a federal judge ruled in favor of the Justice Department in May, which had filed a lawsuit to dissolve the JetBlue-American alliance.
